value.found_quote: Beyond these built-in subagents, you can create your own with custom prompts, tool restrictions, permission modes, hooks, and skills. The following sections show how to get started and customize subagents.
value.rationale: The page explicitly states that users can create their own subagents with custom prompts, tool restrictions, permission modes, hooks, and skills — matching the claim precisely. The documentation further details how to create and configure these custom subagents via the /agents command, markdown files with YAML frontmatter, or CLI flags, and lists all supported frontmatter fields including tools, permissionMode, hooks, and skills. The feature appears to be generally available (active).
